steps.title: Locate the country with 0.55 in 2020
steps.content: Scan the 2020 column of the table to find which country mined 0.55 million metric tons. That country is Kazakhstan.

steps.title: Find that country's 1995 value
steps.content: According to the table, Kazakhstan mined 0.26 million metric tons in 1995. The other choices are either data from different countries or values not present in the table. That matches choice A — A is correct.
